archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Home Services Trust

branding.logo_instructions: Logo top-left of navbar (~140px wide) and footer, with text 'Estrada-Glover Gutters' next to it. Since no actual logo URL is provided, build a typography-based logo using the Outfit font in Deep Navy with an accompanying simple icon.

colors.primary_description: Deep Navy. Use for prominent headings, hero backgrounds, primary text on light backgrounds, and footers.
colors.accent_description: Bright Blue. Use exclusively for CTA buttons, key icons, active states, and highlights.
colors.rules: Strict adherence: Do not use orange/amber or any shades outside the Navy/Blue/Grey/White palette.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

typography.guidelines: Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Never center text by default; align text left for readability unless specifically creating balance in hero or CTA blocks. Ensure contrast ratio is >4.5:1.

layout_and_spacing.cards: Subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius), flat solid backgrounds, minimal shadow, 1px subtle borders (border-gray-200). Use p-6 or p-8 for internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mobile-first. Use 1 column on mobile, 2 on tablet, 3 on desktop for service cards and testimonials.

navbar.style: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200 z-50 fixed w-full top-0
navbar.elements: Logo + 'Estrada-Glover Gutters' text left, Desktop links center, 'Get a Quote' CTA button right.

hero.style: bg-[#0a1f44] text-white relative pt-32 pb-20 lg:pt-48 lg:pb-32
hero.content: Headline targeting seamless gutter installation, subheadline establishing 15+ years of trust, primary CTA 'Get a Quote' and secondary CTA 'Call Now'. Stats banner (15+ Years, 1-Day Install, 5-Star Rating) integrated cleanly below the main content. Overlay background image with bg-[#0a1f44]/80 to ensure text readability.

problems_education.content: 4-column or 2x2 grid showing: Foundation Damage, Fascia Rot, Landscape Erosion, Ice Dams. Use Lucide icons (accent colored) inside solid white cards.

services_grid.content: 6 Service Cards: Seamless Gutter Installation, Leaf Guard Systems, Gutter Repairs, Gutter Cleaning, Downspout Extensions, New Construction & Renos. Clean light grey (#f5f7fa) cards with subtle border and Deep Navy headings.

process.content: 4-step layout detailing the installation process. High-contrast numbers (Bright Blue).

gallery.content: Grid of recent work using provided images. Aspect ratios must be controlled (e.g., aspect-square or 4:3) with object-cover.

testimonials.content: 3 cards showing 5-star ratings. Use yellow/gold for stars, Navy for text, inside clean white cards.

quote_form.content: Shadcn Form elements. White inputs with dark text, or dark inputs with white borders and white text.

mobile_cta_bar.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-gray-200 p-4 z-50 flex justify-between shadow-[0_-4px_6px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] lg:hidden
mobile_cta_bar.content: Buttons for 'Call Now' and 'Get a Quote' spanning the width.

footer.content: Logo + text, contact info, quick links.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All buttons must darken on hover (e.g., bg-[#1e6fc2] to bg-[#155b9e] or bg-[#0a1f44] to bg-[#081733]). Service cards should have a subtle upward translation (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase on hover.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1e6fc2] focus:ring-offset-2 for accessibility.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

image_urls.description: Modern house exterior, use with a heavy navy overlay for hero background
Two story house with clean roof lines

instructions_to_main_agent: Build out the app strictly based on these design guidelines using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Do NOT use HTML native inputs/selects; use Shadcn components properly themed to the Deep Navy/Bright Blue palette.
Implement the Layout and Spacing System exactly as outlined (generous spacing like py-20, py-24).
Ensure the hero background image is properly layered under a heavy #0a1f44 background tint (e.g. bg-[#0a1f44]/80 to bg-[#0a1f44]/90) to guarantee high text contrast.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testability.
Ensure the mobile floating CTA bar is visible and fixed at the bottom ONLY on mobile viewports (lg:hidden).
Maintain strict adherence to the forbidden color rule: NO orange, amber, or slate tones.
